Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: If you've already given up, then why are you complaining about the state of your affairs?

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: Some trees, I swear. You moan about the world without even making an attempt to take charge of your situation.

Line.Text: This is why we get to the top, and whiners like you stay in the dirt.
